raw_consumer_statement: 1st I called them as to why I wasnt getting any statements in XXXX of 2023 and the told me I was paid off I said that wasnt true I still owed approx XXXX. They would not allow any payments. I was no longer getting any statements. About 4 months later Bloomingdales reported me to the credit bureau without every resolving the problem or sending statements. As far as theyll were concern, I didnt owe anything. I wasnt too happy about it, complained and they denied everything. I was later allowed to start paying the money that I owed. I was bothered that they reported me after not allowing me to pay what I owed, in the 1 st place. so I closed the account. I am paying with a current balance of {$5300.00}. Last week out of nowhere the added {$5000.00} and cant give me an explanation as to why my balance is now {$10000.00}.
